## Topic
Describe the paper, report, or technique.

## Source
Link to the original source.

## Checklist
- [ ] Source read and understood
- [ ] Draft written in `drafts/`
- [ ] Attack and defense sections complete
- [ ] Quality checklist passed
- [ ] Posted to Threads
- [ ] Korean quote post published (if bilingual)
- [ ] Archived to `posted/`
